scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "composer --working-dir=backend dev" "pnpm --filter frontend dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter backend build && pnpm --filter frontend build
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d --wait
scripts.setup: docker compose up -d --wait && pnpm install && cd backend && composer install && cp -n .env.example .env && php artisan key:generate --ansi && php artisan migrate --graceful --ansi
